title: Olinda, PE — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Olinda is a city in PE with a population of 393,115. A UNESCO World Heritage city with perfectly preserved colonial architecture, famous for its Carnival celebrations and hilltop views.
